title: quercus iltisii
intro: Quercus iltisii, also known as the Mexican white oak or the Iltis oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of polyphenols, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Quercus iltisii include the potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Quercus iltisii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
